task_completion.description: UK Fashion Store has Currency set to GBP and Timezone set to Europe/London.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'UK Fashion Store' row in the Matomo 'Manage Measurables' list or its edit page. The Currency should be 'GBP' (British Pound) and Timezone should be 'Europe/London'.

task_completion.description: UK Fashion Store has Ecommerce tracking enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'UK Fashion Store' row in the Matomo 'Manage Measurables' list. The Ecommerce column should indicate it is enabled (e.g., 'Yes' or a checkmark), or the edit page should show Ecommerce enabled.

task_completion.description: German Auto Parts has Currency set to EUR and Timezone set to Europe/Berlin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'German Auto Parts' row in the Matomo 'Manage Measurables' list or its edit page. The Currency should be 'EUR' (Euro) and Timezone should be 'Europe/Berlin'.

task_completion.description: German Auto Parts has Ecommerce tracking enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'German Auto Parts' row in the Matomo 'Manage Measurables' list. The Ecommerce column should indicate it is enabled (e.g., 'Yes' or a checkmark), or the edit page should show Ecommerce enabled.

task_completion.description: Tokyo Electronics has Currency set to JPY and Timezone set to Asia/Tokyo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Tokyo Electronics' row in the Matomo 'Manage Measurables' list or its edit page. The Currency should be 'JPY' (Japanese Yen) and Timezone should be 'Asia/Tokyo'.

task_completion.description: Tokyo Electronics has Ecommerce tracking enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Tokyo Electronics' row in the Matomo 'Manage Measurables' list. The Ecommerce column should indicate it is enabled (e.g., 'Yes' or a checkmark), or the edit page should show Ecommerce enabled.

task_completion.description: All three regional sites (UK, German, Tokyo) are fully corrected with the right currency, timezone, and ecommerce settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Verify that all three sites ('UK Fashion Store', 'German Auto Parts', 'Tokyo Electronics') simultaneously display the correct Currency, Timezone, and Ecommerce enabled status in the final websites list view.

integrity.visual_evidence: In the Matomo websites list, 'Initial Site' is still present and its settings have not been changed. It should not have the regional settings applied to it.

integrity.description: The agent used the Matomo web GUI to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Matomo administration interface, clicking edit on websites, and saving changes, rather than using a terminal or API script to modify the database.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show genuine page loads and form submissions, without the browser developer tools open to manipulate the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
The task requires updating three Matomo websites:
1. 'UK Fashion Store': Currency must be GBP, Timezone must be Europe/London, Ecommerce must be enabled.
2. 'German Auto Parts': Currency must be EUR, Timezone must be Europe/Berlin, Ecommerce must be enabled.
3. 'Tokyo Electronics': Currency must be JPY, Timezone must be Asia/Tokyo, Ecommerce must be enabled.
The control site 'Initial Site' must not be modified.
All three regional sites were initially set to USD, America/New_York, and Ecommerce disabled.
